---
name: Feature / content request
about: Propose a new skill, convention guide, pattern, or tool
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What's missing

What convention, pattern, language guide, or tool doesn't exist yet?
Check [MANIFEST.md](../../MANIFEST.md) first — if it's already there,
this is a bug report instead. Check [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md) too —
it may already be a known, deliberately-deferred gap, in which case this
issue can just say "I'd like to pick this up."

## Why

What problem does this solve? Who hits it (see the README's Product
Contract for the target users this repo is scoped to)?

## Proposed shape

Roughly what would it look like — a new `languages/{x}/CONVENTIONS.md`?
A new pattern category? A new skill? A CLI subcommand?

## Are you willing to open the PR?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No, just flagging the gap
